title: Apollo's Piracy Mod
description: This mod was created for the Apollo YouTube channel
body:
This mod was made for the [Apollo YouTube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@Apollo-official)

Mod includes:
Custom new Armour sets,
Custom new Swords,
Custom new Items,
Custom new Villager,


Made by EthRocky

Models by [Kalam0n](https://www.youtube.com/@Kalam0n)
